title: BusinessType
description: Catalogue entry that drives per-workspace defaults. NOT a database table — the `Workspace.business_type` column carries the enum key and Workspaces resolves the entry from `data/business-types.json` (seeded into `config/workspaces.php` on install). Feature toggles, terminology overrides, seeded roles, and starter entitlements all flow from this catalogue at workspace provisioning time.

x-storage.note: `php artisan workspaces:sync-catalogue` mirrors `data/business-types.json` into `config/workspaces.php` on every deploy so a Laravel dev never edits config directly.

x-translatable.reason: BusinessType is a config catalogue (NOT an Eloquent model / DB table), so the `HasTranslations` trait does not apply. Localised copies live inline in the same config file: each catalogue entry carries a `translations` map that mirrors the JSONB shape used by Eloquent-backed tier-A models (`{ locale_code: { field: value } }`). The Workspaces resolver reads the active locale from the request context.
x-translatable.wire_convention: Active-locale projection onto `label` + `description` by default. Full blob returned under `data.translations` when the request carries `?include=translations`.

key.description: Enum key. Also the value written to `workspaces.business_type`.

label.description: Human label shown on the workspace picker + admin. Active-locale projection; full per-locale map available via `translations` (see `x-translatable` block) or `?include=translations` on the wire.

translations.description: Per-locale content translations. Shape: `{ locale_code: { label: string, description: string } }`. Wire-included only when `?include=translations`. Physical source is the same `data/business-types.json` entry — no separate table.

label_translations.description: DEPRECATED — superseded by `translations` (which covers both label + description). Kept for one release for backward-compatibility; a normalizer at load time hoists label_translations values into `translations[<locale>].label` when both are present. Remove after v0.4.0.

hero_image_url.description: Optional hero shown on the self-serve `/sign-up` screen when this business type is selected.

default_config.description: Bag of workspace defaults applied at provisioning time.

features.description: Feature keys enabled by default. Consumed by the FeatureFlag module. e.g. `athletes`, `teams`, `attendance`, `scheduling`, `progress`, `competition`.

terminology.description: Resource-label overrides. Keys are canonical resource names (e.g. `athletes`); values are the display label for this business type (e.g. `Students` for schools, `Members` for gyms).

roles.description: Role keys seeded on workspace provisioning. Consumed by Access. `owner` is always seeded (from Access) regardless of this list.

entitlements.description: Starter entitlements applied at provisioning. Keyed by entitlement id (e.g. `athletes.max`, `branches.max`, `storage_gb.max`). The Subscription module overrides these once a plan is picked.

onboarding_steps.description: IDs of onboarding steps surfaced to first-time owners. Consumed by the Overview dashboard's onboarding checklist widget.

sports.description: Sports (or programme) keys pre-enabled for this business type.

priority.description: Sort order on the self-serve business-type picker (ascending).

is_visible.description: When false, the business type is hidden from the self-serve picker and can only be assigned by platform admins.
